headline: Duke Energy (DUK) Is Betting On Nuclear As Offshore Wind Loses Favor
summary: Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) is shifting focus from offshore wind to expanding nuclear power capacity. The company cites rising costs, supply constraints, and policy uncertainty around offshore wind projects. The pivot is aimed at meeting increasing electricity demand from data centers and advanced manufacturing in the Carolinas. Duke Energy enters this shift with its stock at $126.86 and a 1 year return of 11.3%. Over 3 years the stock shows a 55.1% return, and over 5 years a 48.1% return, which...
